raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The West Valley Food Pantry experienced a quadrupling of community members in need of its services during the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "The West Valley Food Pantry has assisted more than 240,000 individuals over the last 18 months.",
    "On average, the West Valley Food Pantry has been providing groceries to approximately 11,000 individuals monthly.",
    "The $3.5 million in funding will allow the West Valley Food Pantry to transition into a permanent facility designed for providing food and groceries, as well as vital services to individuals experiencing homelessness.",
    "The new facility planned for the West Valley Food Pantry will include an upgraded commercial kitchen with large walk-in coolers for healthier and fresher food options."
  ]
```
